Name: Nguni
Description: An indigenous cattle breed produced widely in South Africa and especially associated with eastern and northern grazing systems.

Name: Bonsmara
Description: A dominant South African beef breed with broad commercial adoption across inland and mixed grazing regions.
Location: FS, NW, NC, LP, MP, EC

Name: Afrikaner Cattle
Description: A hardy indigenous-derived cattle breed associated with hot, extensive beef systems.

Name: Drakensberger
Description: A South African beef breed strongly linked to the eastern interior and Drakensberg-adjacent regions.

Name: Brahman
Description: A heat-tolerant beef breed widely used in South Africa's warm commercial cattle areas and crossbreeding systems.
Location: LP, NW, MP, KZN, FS, GP
